nodes.name: Calamonastes
nodes.summary: Calamonastes（Calamonastes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Stierling's wren-warbler、Grey wren-warbler、Barred wren-warbler等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stierling's wren-warbler
nodes.summary: Stierling's wren-warbler (Calamonastes stierlingi), is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae found in southern Africa. It is sometimes considered a subspecies of the miombo wren-warbler. References External links Stierling's wren-warbler - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
